title: InventoryCrouch
description: Lets You Keep Crouching While Opening A GUI
body:
Inventory Crouch

Inventory Crouch is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that lets you stay crouched while opening your inventory or other GUIs.

Normally, Minecraft forces you to stop sneaking when opening your inventory — which can be annoying during PvP, parkour, building over voids, or precise positioning. This mod fixes that.

Features

Keeps you crouching while your inventory is open

Works with any GUI (inventory, chests, crafting, etc.)

No keybinds, no config — just works

Fully client-side

Compatibility

Minecraft versions: 1.21 – 1.21.11

Loader: Fabric

Compatible with most other client-side mods


Simple, minimal, and effective — Inventory Crouch does one thing and does it well.
